utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the required format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); plus total_budget (complete cost breakdown), making it 7 total items. In the final package, all 7 appear: destination is present; travel_dates are specified; transportation includes provider/type/flight numbers and a cost; accommodation includes name/details and a cost; activities include items with dates and costs (one with 0 cost but still specified); additional_services is present (empty list, still included); total_budget has total_cost and a breakdown. Each item includes the required details per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: Destination is 'Rome, Italy' which has a destination rating. Transportation lists 'Budget Airlines' with type Flights; in the ground truth, 'budget_airlines' categories exist but not by provider name, so we map to the relevant class: since no cabin class is specified but typical budget airline offering would align closest to Economy Class on budget airlines; however, the package doesn't specify class beyond 'Flights'. Given the budget airline context and cost-focused choice, we map to 'budget_airlines' -> 'Economy Class'. Accommodation is 'Boutique Stay' which directly matches an accommodation option. Activities include 'City Walking Tour' which directly matches an activity. 'Night Market Visit (Testaccio Market)' does not have a direct match in activities or night_activities lists; there is no 'Night Market Visit' item, so we cannot assign a rating for that item. No additional services included. Therefore, we map the four identifiable items.
